name: Bench-Warmer Beer Dip
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: For best results use a pasturized process cheese with jalapeno peppers in it (such as Mexican Velveeta).
1) In medium saucepan, over LOW heat, cook cream cheese, pasteurized cheese and beer, until melted and smooth.
2) Stir in beans, scallions and tomatoes; heat through.
3) Serve warm or cold as a dip with pretzels, chips of tortilla crisps. Makes 3 1/2 cups.
NOTE: Can also be served like nachos. Arrange chips on plate. Pour heated dip over top. Serve.
